title: C.H. Robinson Worldwide (CHRW) Q3 Earnings Surpass Estimates
text: C.H. Robinson Worldwide (CHRW) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.84 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.82 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.78 per share a year ago.
